Sensing your approach, [gooarmor.name] quickly morphs into a shapeless blob and scoots a couple steps away from you. She suddenly reforms with her back turned to you, appearing in a slightly different guise than her normal self. Her hair is not in the loose, wavy fashion it normally is, but instead, it is tied in a low ponytail. The silvery companion doesn’t turn around, so you can’t tell if something is wrong.
After a brief moment, you call to her. <i>“
Next
You tap [gooarmor.name] for a chat but she is too busy looking around the pool area, wide-eyed.
“Wooow. Look at this place!” She is enamored by the water and turns to you, noticing your swimwear. “You’re gonna go swimming?”
You nod and tell her you are.
“Like, can I join, too?”
She’s waterproof, you think to yourself. “Sure, why not?”
“Yay!” With that, she jumps with excitement. “Ooh, let me get dressed first!” She shuffles in place, peeling off her pretend goo clothing. “And no peeking...” she winks, “...unless you want to!”

With some concentration, [gooarmor.name]’s form rearranges itself and a new shape appears around the surface of her body. Two string-like blobs appear on each of her jiggly breasts, barely covering her silvery nipples, creating a kind of loose bikini top.
Her lower body splits into two, forming shapely legs that
Her shapely legs spread apart slightly to
Her legs merge into one central blob, then the mass quickly splits into two, forming shapely legs that
make room for the bottom half of her bikini to squeeze into. Her bikini bottom then divides and extends to merge with the strings of her top, converting her swimsuit into an extra-lewd slingkini.
“So, how do you like it?” She twirls. “I think it’s quite sexy!” You give her outfit a once-over. ‘Sexy’ is an understatement--if she wore anything skimpier, she’d be a full-blown exhibitionist!
You are not sure that term would really apply to goos who can just form into anything they want though. Technically, she is always naked...
You take a moment to test the water from the pool’s edge and proceed to walk right in until you are submerged up to the top of your chest. You turn around and invite [gooarmor.name] in.
Next
Spotting you with head gear, [gooarmor.name] gets incredibly curious. “Ooo, neat. What’s this do?” she asks, poking it with a gooey finger.

You tell her it’s a helmet that protects you from inhaling dangerous gasses and protects against other fluids as well. You also add that it may also help in breathing underwater if the rest of the suit is fully sealed, pressurized, and hooked up to a rebreather.
“Awesome! You think I can make something like that?” She presses her face against the front, obscuring your view with her flattened face.

“Yay!” The gray goo girl leaps up at you to rest herself on your shoulders. The majority of her mass is wrapped around your dome, making you wobble a bit as your vision is masked in complete darkness. After a minute or two, there is a muffled “Okay, I think I’ve got it!” and then she launches herself off you, making you stagger back.

When your vision returns, you find [gooarmor.name] in a half-kneeling pose on the floor, her arms bent and hands balled in a determined fashion, her face in deep concentration. As you [pc.move] towards her, her head is suddenly engulfed in a shapeless silvery blob. The blob then inflates into a more orb-like shape. [gooarmor.name] then stands up to face you.

“H-How can you see through this thing?” But just as she says that, her microbots get to work in adjusting their composition to make the surface of the new ‘helmet’ optically transparent in the visible light spectrum. The silver-gray color then gradually dissolves, leaving behind a very solid but clear window. “Oh, there we go--I mean, I meant to do that!” She says in response, her bubbly face now completely visible behind the simulated glass.
Next

[gooarmor.name] seems restless, constantly squirming around; it’s a bit distracting. There must be something on her mind. You call her and she quickly reshapes to form a face, it shows an expression full of eagerness and curiosity.
“Tell me, tell me. Whatcha have there? I wanna know. Lemme touch it.”
Wait, what? What’s she talking about? You ask her what she means.
“Your thingy, the hot one. Lemme see. I wanna touch it!” She looks so determined right now, looking at you with puppy eyes, her eagerness unchanged.
You’re not in the mood for sex right now. Is she always thinking about that?
“Aw...” She seems a little disappointed, then she looks at you again. “But that’s not what I mean. I wanna see that warm tech you have. What’s it for?”
Oh! She means

She slowly extends a gooey tendril, and with a sudden move, yanks the item from your hands. “Yoink!” Hey! That’s not nice. You frown and scold her. “Aw! Don’t be mean. Bestest friends share. I’ll give it back later, pinkie promise.”
The cheeky gray-goo scrutinizes the piece of tech for a few moments then pushes it against her pillowy chest and absorbs it.

“He, he! It tickles, so fuzzy, so... warm? Oh! Oh! Now I get it. That’s why you want it, innit? Warmth! But you don’t need it. You have me. Your bestest friend gotcha covered.” Her expression changes completely, she looks like she’s trying very hard to concentrate.
Suddenly, you feel the temperature around you change completely. It feels like a warm cocoon, a sheath of fixed temperature formed around you, fitting almost like a glove.

“See? It’s simple. You just have to oscillate an asynchronous double-layered EM field to retain the IR around you while the secondary layer creates a turbulence gap between the first layer and the colder environment. The sheer kinetic energy output involved pre-heats incoming gases and can be modulated to filter out any hazardous particles. The result is a constant bubble of portable, sterilized, climate-controlled environment around the user. Too easy!”

[gooarmor.name] sounds ecstatic and is speaking so fast you have trouble keeping up, let alone understand what she just said. In any case, it’s impressive. She’s smarter than she looks at first glance.
[gooarmor.name] can now protect you against cold hazards.
You approach [gooarmor.name] for a chat, but find her face suddenly blanche (that is, if she wasn’t already a full coat of solid silver-gray).
She responds, with an unnatural heaving noise. Then the sound of bubbling and gurgling rumbles through her tummy. “Umm... I don’t feel so good...” She finally exhales, clutching her midsection.
“Wh-what happened?”
“Please don’t get mad at me, [pc.name]...” She begs a caveat.
Gurgle. “W-well... like...” Bubble. “...you know those energy drinks you keep in your pack?”
Energy drinks? What energy drinks?

“I-I wanted to taste them... and they were too yummy... and... and I drank a whole, whole bunch! I couldn’t help myself! I’m SOOOO sorry!” She blurts, hands now covering her mouth. The gurgling seems to have instantly stopped after the climax of her confession. “Hm?”

You double-check your inventory and notice it being a bit lighter than you remember. Open and mostly-empty canisters roll out, one by one, and fall to the hard floor. You squat down to investigate. Hm. It seems [gooarmor.name] has been drinking - or in her case, assimilating - the gray microbots you’ve been holding in your inventory... You stand up to let [gooarmor.name] know exactly what she drank, but as you turn to her, an unnoticed puddle of gray microbots forces you to slip and lose your balance. You go head first toward a nearby wall and your vision goes black.
“[pc.name]!”

You find [gooarmor.name] sitting on the floor, shifting and humming about to herself. She seems to be sipping away at a straw connected to a

“Oh, heya, [pc.name]! What’s up?” Her smile gleams as bright as ever. You ask if she wants to chat and she nods excitedly, forming her lower body into a blob and extending herself towards you. As she swirls herself around you, she continues, “Sure, what do ya--...” Her orbit slows down as she examines you deeper. Expression furrowing, she pouts in concentration. “Hey...”
“Is something wrong?” you ask.
In response, [gooarmor.name] melts into a puddle and surrounds your [pc.feet]. Then, her amorphous mass gradually rises and climbs your [pc.legOrLegs]...

and leads into
the various encounters she’s seen on your adventure.
“...and I’ve learned so much from that. That’s why it’s great tagging along with you!” she confesses.
a topic about some parasitic creature.
“...and you should be careful around them, or they’ll go up your butt and never come out!” she concludes.
what planets she would like to travel to next.
“...I think so, too! Yep. Ice Cream Planet... or Frozen Yogurt. Whatever!” she imagines.
the freezing weather.
<i>“...but it’s soooo
how ausars speak. She tries to imitate different dialects of the ausar language, failing horribly.
“...I know right? I can’t really tell the difference either!” she replies.
a previous public debate in U.G.C. politics.
“...and I don’t know much about that foreign gobbly-gook she keeps talking about, but she looks like a total bitch! I mean, have you heard her laugh?” she comments.
a recent charity to help fund research for a remedy to some rare SSTD.
“...and yeah, I would totally help if I could earn the credits. You think I can give blowjobs for donations?” she ponders.
a questionable mod being advertised on the holo-boards.

a legend about pastry golems.

a plan to surprise Celise at her next birthday.
“...and that’s when we throw her a big party and everything, yah?” she asks.
You
an idea involving Reaha and settling here on New Texas.
“...and we can have a big farm to put her in!” she illustrates with her hands. “Hmm... I really don’t know what I can be. What do you think she’ll like better: a chicken, a pig, or a horse?”
Anno’s grooming habits.

a discussion about a particular product.
“...like, BIG-big! Hmmm... do you think [bess.name] would know if JoyCo sells something like that?” she asks.
some comments about Yammi’s cooking--namely her desserts.
“...Oh, yesssssss! She makes the yummiest milkshakes and sundaes, too!” she exclaims.

original: [gooarmor.name]
wipes the previous pattern and
wriggles a bit in preparation.
[gooarmor.name] doesn’t even wriggle and the pattern you had decorating your suit quickly vanishes.
One by one, lines draw hexagonal tiles on certain parts of your suit, giving it a very modern flavor.
Like a marker, polished silver trim is drawn along the edges of your suit, giving it an elegant yet simple look.
Lines of silver are drawn on your suit, bending in angles and ending either off the edge or capped with a dot or circle shape. This circuit board pattern makes your suit look very tech-oriented.
Gradually, the new pattern you requested emerges on the surface of the suit until your suit is covered in the new design.
{var0}

[gooarmor.name] quickly engulfs your head with her gooey matter. Your vision is eclipsed in black for a few seconds before the microbots blocking your eyes begin to clear up, creating a transparent layer and allowing you to see your reflection in the mirror.

The helmet on your head quickly opens opens up and rapidly dissolves, melding back into the suit from which it came. After making some final aesthetic adjustments, [gooarmor.name] squeals in approval. “Now just remember to be careful out there!”

The surface of your new head gear becomes more defined until it changes into something similar to a sports speeder’s helmet, but with some noticeable accents. Something tells you that if [gooarmor.name] wasn’t completely silver-gray, the surface would be colored bright pink and decked with heart-shaped stickers.
“How do you like that? Nice and stylish!”

The helmet’s form twists and shifts, with edges and sharp points appearing across its surface. The viewable area narrows until your reflection shows that it has become a linear slit masking your eyes. The helmet itself is flush with the shape of your head, allowing it to move in sync without wobbling. In the right lighting, at the right angle, you can almost see a piercing glow emanating from your eye slit.
“Ooh, yeah. Now you look super scary!”

The entire dome inflates into a spherical shape, forming a very distinctive bubble that steadily continues to grow larger. When it reaches the appropriate size for you, the rest of the orb’s silvery gray tint dissolves away, leaving behind a glass-like surface. You experimentally tap it a few times and determine that it sounds very much like glass too--and hopefully a lot more durable!
“Is this how ancient spacers looked? I like it!”

The helmet’s surface smoothes out and warps to match the dimensions of your head, then the transparency re-shades itself in a silver, reflexive film - painting the entire front to form a smooth, featureless mask. No one can see your face even though you can see through it just fine. This definitely gives you a very anonymous appearance.
“Ooo, mysterious!”

The headgear’s surface molds into a shape that looks very similar to a round hoverbike helmet, complete with its own flip visor, and fits snugly with your head. At the top, two blobs protrude from the surface. They reshape to form a pair of large, triangular animal ears, like those belonging to a cat or fennec-like creature.
“Aw, that makes you look like such a cutie!”

The mass around the helmet reshapes itself into a more blocky shape, yet retaining some familiar curvature. A tough-looking visor and an obvious mouthguard form in the front while a slight cap tops the frame and thick ear shells cover the sides, making the headgear appear in line with standard military wear. After a few adjustments, the final design looks like it can take a good beating but remain intact.
“Like, do you wanna live forever?! Ooh-rah!”

The silvery blob splits and forms into two pointed pieces, one below your lower jaw and the other above your head, looking very much like a shark or bird maw--and, like the mouth of a beast, the “jaw” closes around your head, flattening and reshaping as it goes, the corners polarized at three distinct points. When finished, the helmet gives off the illusion that you are wearing a tricorn hat, closed off by a large collar under your chin.
“Cool, you look kinda like a pirate now!”

The silver surface of the new helmet begins to split and form separate plates of armor. The plates move and position themselves around your head, creating a regal, crown-like shape at the top and leaving a “Y”-shaped gap as a primary slit for your eyes.
“I hereby dub thee, Knight of Steele!”

The helmet then forms a cloth-shaped piece that extends in front of you, draping over your head, falling to the sides, and resting atop your shoulders, resulting in a very rogue-like hood. The inside of the helmet is covered in shadow when you are in the right light.
“Hoodies like this are in style, right?”

The helmet’s surface divides and splits into several straps, wrapping around certain areas across your face. Some of the straps then flatten out, creating a mask for your mouth, a blindfold for your eyes, and finally a sheath to cover the entirety of your head. Across the surface, the straps imitate stitching, fasteners, zippers and even spikes. Ultimately, your new helmet appears very much at home on top of a bondage suit.
“Ooo, kinky!”

The sheet of silver surrounding your head flattens until it is firmly pressed against your face, sensually hugging it in a latex-like texture. Transparent holes open up to reveal your [pc.eyes], though
<i>“Ooo,

The blob shifts and changes to the desired shape you suggested. You find that [gooarmor.name] pays very close attention to detail, even though she gets carried away with her own unique flourishes. When all is said and done, you find that your suit now possesses a newly designed helmet.
“There ya go and I hope you like it!”
She then retracts the helmet back so you can breathe the unfiltered air again. She’ll have your new helmet ready again when you need it most.

As you approach the door of Azra’s quarters, a low-key murmur reaches you. You can’t make head or tails from this far away and through the bulkhead, but the distinct coherence points to a conversation, indecipherable as it is from where you’re standing. Not to intrude in what could be a private moment, you lean in closer and pay attention in order to figure out if you should go right in - right after knocking, of course - or come back later. It’s not as if you’re eavesdropping, you try to convince yourself as you stick your [pc.ear] to the metal door. The murmuring becomes clearer. There’s Azra, that one’s a given, and the other actor in this dialog would be... giggles? Oh! It’s [gooarmor.name]! That’s unexpected, but you’d recognized her trademark laughter anywhere. Recoiling first, you knock on the door, requesting permission to enter the stance. “Come on in!” Azra exclaims, raising her voice a little. “It’s open.” Well then, you let yourself in, only to be met with one peculiar scene. [gooarmor.name] is donning an unbuttoned lab-coat made out of her own microbots and chasing Azra around like a lost puppy looking for an adoptive mother; an unusually large - if gracious - one. The portentously sizable suula strides along in a hurry, carrying test tubes, samples, and flasks full of who knows what, moving back and forth between her indoor garden and her portable workstation. With [gooarmor.name] in tow, imprinted like a little duckling, Azra stumbles as she walks, more than once, attempting not to collide with your grey-goo comrade. “Ah, pardon me!” Azra excuses herself, juggling a batch of soil samples as she raises her left leg and tail to avoid bumping into [gooarmor.name], but in turn, bumps against her table’s corner. Fortunately, Azra’s armor readily absorbs the impact to the point the mighty suula simply shrugs it off as if it has never happened. For a moment, the chaotic dance between the two women makes you wonder if they are rehearsing for a comic role. Nevertheless, both look highly focused, and [gooarmor.name] in particular is acting really serious, endeavoring to assist Azra to the best of her abilities, providing the siren with whatever item she necessitates or fulfilling every task she requires. Truth be told, you feel like an intruder, interrupting important research.
